title: Wille

html:
"I've heard this story countless times already."
This article or section needs to be updated, since more information has become available. (Add pics, too, if needed.)
Please discuss this issue, or begin editing the page.

Wille （ヴィレ; Ger. "will") is an anti-Nerv organization, dedicated to preventing future Impact events. Its first appearance is in Evangelion 3.0: You Can (Not) Redo.

Wille was formed following the government disbanding of Nerv after Third Impact and comprised of many former Nerv staff members. It is led by Captain Misato Katsuragi. All staff but the Eva pilots wear a blue bandanna somewhere on their person, usually tied around the upper left arm.

Its operations have been based in an ocean fleet, led by the massive flagship AAA Wunder. After Evangelion Unit-01 is recovered from space and employed as a power source, the fleet becomes airborne.

Staff[edit]

  • Captain Misato Katsuragi (leader, Naval Captain)
  • Ritsuko Akagi (Vice Captain)
  • Asuka Shikinami Langley (pilot of Eva-02)
  • Mari Makinami Illustrious (pilot of Eva-08)
  • Shigeru Aoba
  • Makoto Hyuga
  • Maya Ibuki
  • Sakura Suzuhara (Toji's sister)
  • Koji Takao
  • Sumire Nagara
  • Hideki Tama
  • Midori Kitakami
Organizations
Seele | Gehirn | United Nations | IPEA | JSSDF | Wille | Kredit
Special Agency Nerv:
Nerv Headquarters | Nerv 1st Branch | Nerv 2nd Branch | Nerv 3rd Branch
Nerv 7th Branch (Tabgha Base) | Bethany Base | Golgotha Base




This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
